entry.title: [GRA][Collaborative solutions] - MX Plan Filerz Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 20, 23:00 UTC  -  Aug 21, 04:00 UTC

Jul 9, 03:16 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our responsibilities for Mail filerz, we will be performing infrastructure maintenance.
The maintenance will update the storage servers hosting your data.
This version brings improvements to certain security mechanisms, as well as some performance enhancements.

Start time : 20/08/2026 23:00 UTC
End time : 21/08/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : The service will be temporarily unavailable for 40 minutes during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Mail filerz.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [FR][VoIP] - Softcall incident notification
entry.content:
Jul 18, 12:02 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Softcall offering has been resolved.

Start time : 13/07/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 18/07/2026 12:00 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by this maintenance : https://public-cloud.status-ovhcloud.com/incidents/m5qn00qgl9zh

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 17, 12:21 UTC
Investigating - We are currently experiencing an incident affecting our Softcall offering.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 13/07/2026 07:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Softcall-related components on Public Cloud Instances are experiencing erratic behavior.
Customers Impact : Customers may experience intermittent issues or unstable behavior when using services relying on the affected Softcall components.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating the root cause of the issue and working to restore normal service behavior as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA1][Web Hosting] - Cluster024 incident notification
entry.content:
Jul 17, 15:58 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting offering has been resolved.

Start time : 17/07/2026 14:27 UTC
End time : 17/07/2026 15:55 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 17, 14:43 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering, which is causing temporary issue in the Cluster024.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 17/07/2026 14:27 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : An overload has been detected, causing unavailability and increased latency on Cluster024.
Customers Impact :Some customers are temporarily unable to access and use their websites hosted on Cluster024.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - MXPlan/Zimbra incident notification
entry.content:
Jul 17, 15:32 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Collaborative solutions offering has been resolved.

Start time : 16/07/2026 19:00 UTC
End time : 17/07/2026 15:30 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 17, 07:44 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Collaborative solutions offer on the specific GLOBAL region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 16/07/2026 19:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Migration form MXPlan to Zimbra is temporarily facing slowness.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to modify the accounts associated with their email addresses.
Customers will receive a mail when their migration is finished.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a software issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 17, 07:39 UTC
Investigating - We are currently experiencing an event affecting our Collaborative solutions offer.

Our teams are fully committed to investigating this issue and working towards a resolution as soon as possible. As investigations are ongoing, we will share any new findings or updates with you as soon as possible.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Cluster100 Incident Notification
entry.content:
Jul 17, 08:58 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting offering on Cluster100 has been resolved.

Start time : 17/07/2026 01:24 UTC.
End time : 17/07/2026 03:15 UTC
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 17, 03:49 UTC
Monitoring - We had an incident on our our Web Hosting offering and service has been fully restored since 17/07/2026 03:15 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 17/07/2026 01:24 UTC.
Impacted Service(s) : The Cluster100 was experiencing latency.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily facing slowness when trying to access and use their websites located in Cluster100.
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Filerz444 Cluster115 Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
Jul 16, 21:52 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jul 16, 21:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jul 16, 15:03 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Web Hosting offer On filerz444 Cluster115.

Start time : 16/07/2026 21:00 UTC
End time : 16/07/2026 23:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance window, a network maintenance will be performed. Websites will be temporarily inaccessible for 30 minutes.

Thank you for your understanding.
